form.formComment: Strong performance after racing just off the speed to win by a long neck at this track over 305m (17.66) beating Space Conspiracy in Class 5 H on April 10. With a clean start should be thereabouts.

form.formComment: Was among the placegetters latest at this track when a 1.5 lengths second but did clock a slick 17.58 over the 305m trip. Heading in the right direction and well placed to be very competitive.

form.formComment: Placed last time (17.52) at this track in a Class 5 H, finishing second and beaten 4 lengths. Has six wins and eight placings from 16 starts from the draw. Cannot be taken lightly based on that sound recent effort.
